emitted_claims.text: The packet supports bounded reconstruction of the listed structural fields.

non_claims: The packet does not establish completeness beyond the listed fields.
The packet does not establish authorization.
permitted_narrowing: restrict the claim to a subset of listed fields
required_local_revalidation: Revalidate any downstream assertion that is not textually identical to an emitted claim.
Do not treat structural verification, source presence, or this handoff artifact as truth, compliance, approval, authority, or evidence sufficiency.
